description_long: This is a female adult figure with a slender build, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. She is dressed in a short-sleeved tunic top with a fitted belt at the waist, paired with a short skirt and knee-high boots. The outfit appears to be practical and somewhat stylized, suitable for urban or casual settings. Her hair is long, straight, and falls past her shoulders, framing her face. The facial features are neutral, and there are no visible accessories or carried items. The overall appearance is clean and simple, with a focus on functional attire.
description: A standing adult woman in a short-sleeved tunic, skirt, and knee-high boots, with long straight hair and a neutral expression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full outfit, facial features, and long straight hair framing the face.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the drape of the tunic, and the length of the boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the tunic, the straight fall of the hair, and the back of the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the way the clothing fits the body.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved tunic top with fitted belt, short skirt, and knee-high boots
